title: Close Loop on Positive FIT
summary: Detect positive FIT results and determine whether diagnostic colonoscopy follow-up still needs to be arranged.
problem_statement: Positive FIT results can remain open if colonoscopy follow-up is not coordinated quickly.

inputs.name: completion_state
inputs.description: Whether diagnostic colonoscopy has already been ordered or completed.

rule_sets.summary: If FIT is positive and no colonoscopy closure exists, draft the next diagnostic step.

actions.label: Create FIT review item
actions.description: Queue a colorectal screening closure task.

actions.label: Draft outreach message
actions.description: Prepare outreach for the responsible team.

examples: FIT positive and no documented colonoscopy follow-up is present.
